title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 05 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 05 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 05 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/11/2025
Today, the Dalian iron ore futures market moved steadily and fluctuated narrowly. The main contract I2601 finally closed at 776 yuan,down 0.26% from the previous working day. The mainstream spot price at ports was down 2-3 yuan/tonne from the previous working day.
